result.reasoning: The task is to identify the person standing at the front of the first picture in the latest 2022 Wikipedia article on alt-J, formatted as "First name Last name". The tool call history shows: Step 1 retrieved the 2022 Wikipedia article revision; Step 2 attempted to extract the first image filename; Step 3 retrieved metadata for the image "Alt-J,_October_2017.jpg", with a description listing band members left to right; Step 4 analyzed the description and determined Joe Newman is the front person; Step 5 formatted the answer as "Joe Newman". I rely on the tool history's determination. The user-specified format provides authoritative casing, so I output "Joe Newman" exactly as derived. Applied casing rule: following authoritative format "First name Last name".
